tool.name: facebook_bulk_search
tool.description: Search multiple queries on Facebook in parallel using concurrent browser tabs. Use this instead of calling facebook_search multiple times - it is faster and more efficient. Pass all queries as a single comma-separated string. Example: 'AI startups,web development,machine learning'.

parameters.name: queries
parameters.description: Comma-separated search queries (e.g. 'tech news,gaming community,cooking recipes')
